programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. programme.desc: Comedy with Tiffany Haddish and Rose Byrne. When two friends' beauty business gets into dire financial difficulty, they turn to a scary CEO for help.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: On Merseyside, George has radical ideas to redesign an Edwardian home. In Surrey, he tackles a Victorian country house that has accrued some bizarre additions over the years.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, three couples compete with holiday-inspired menus, in a week featuring a sweaty confession, an underwhelming paella and an alpha male arm wrestle.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Isle of Wight, restorer Ronnie relives his past life in Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When Cliff gets ill, Norm helps him by delivering the mail, but gets arrested for allegedly tampering with the post.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An absurd bet that Sam made during his wild days comes back to haunt him when the man he made the wager with shows up. If Sam can't triumph, he must forfeit the bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's reputation as a ladies' man takes a battering when a journalist comes to the bar to report on Boston's singles scene and is irked by his smugness.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's shocked when she suddenly realises that she wishes her own mother was more like Marie..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra thinks that it's Ray's turn to take charge of birth control, so he decides to have his 'wires cut', but then chickens out..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert decides that he's too old to be living with his parents, so he moves in with another elderly couple - who turn out to be carbon copies of Frank and Marie.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier shares an unexpected kiss with Julia while trying to steal files from her ex's office. Niles enjoys a trip to the shooting range more than he expected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz prepares to leave the radio station and join a rival company, but not before voicing her concerns about Frasier's new relationship with Julia.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz isn't happy when the station announces that it's found her replacement. But if she stays, she'll have to put up with Frasier's new romance.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A Man, a Plan, and a Gal - Julia: Daphne and Niles have an important announcement to make, but Frasier's girlfriend steals their thunder.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to transform New Jersey Italian restaurant Da Mimmo, which is run by a mother and her three sons - two of whom see the business as a failure..

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Back on the road, Susan's finds doe-eyed Jersey cows and is knee deep in spuds. And in Guernsey she fires the noon day canon, alongside spectacular beaches and stunning scenery.

programme.title: Springtime on the Farm

programme.title: Warship: Life in the Royal Navy
programme.desc: JJ Chalmers returns to his Royal Marine roots, facing one of their toughest challenges on unforgiving Dartmoor. Kate Humble is in the thick of the action aboard HMS Iron Duke.
